overall.description: A cinematic dialogue scene from The Witcher 3 video game showing four characters seated around a wooden tavern table illuminated by candlelight. The camera is positioned at table level in a dimly lit rustic interior with wooden beams, capturing an intimate conversation between Geralt and companions.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot of four characters seated around a wooden tavern table in a dimly lit rustic interior. The scene is illuminated by a central candle holder casting warm light on the characters' faces. The camera slowly pans between speakers as they engage in conversation, with wooden beams overhead and small windows visible in the background walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, intimate focus on a group of companions gathered in a dimly lit rustic tavern. It begins with a static view of four characters seated around a heavy wooden table, where a central candle holder casts a warm, flickering glow across their faces. As the conversation unfolds, the camera slowly pans between the speakers, shifting the perspective to capture their reactions. The movement reveals more of the surrounding environment, gliding past overhead wooden beams and small windows set into the background walls before settling on the final speaker.
